majorTuition.zh: 清华大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Tsinghua University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 清华大学是中国最顶尖的理工科大学，工程和计算机科学全球领先。培养了大量国家领导人和科技精英。
desc.en: Tsinghua is China's top science and engineering university with globally leading programs. Has produced numerous national leaders and tech elites.

safetyDetail.zh: 清华大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Tsinghua University has strict campus security and good safety.

climate.zh: 因城市而异
climate.en: Varies by city

visa.zh: 中国学生：无需签证。国际学生：X1签证(长期)或X2签证(短期)。毕业后可通过工作签证留华。
visa.en: Chinese students: no visa needed. International: X1 visa (long-term) or X2 (short-term). Post-graduation work visa available.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍通常有保障。
housing.en: On-campus dormitory typically guaranteed.

employment.zh: 就业前景良好，学校提供就业指导服务。
employment.en: Good employment prospects with career guidance services.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 国际学生需购买综合医疗保险约¥600-800/年。校内设有校医院，提供基本医疗服务。持医保可报销部分费用。
healthcare.en: ✅ International students must purchase insurance ~¥600-800/yr. On-campus hospital provides basic medical services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：高考统招（内地生）/ 各校国际生申请系统
📅 截止日期：高考后填报志愿 / 国际生1月-5月
💰 申请费：¥0（高考）/ ¥200-800（国际生）
📝 所需材料：高考成绩 / 国际课程成绩、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Gaokao (mainland) / University international portal
📅 Deadline: After Gaokao / International: Jan-May
💰 Fee: ¥0 (Gaokao) / ¥200-800 (international)
📝 Required: Gaokao scores / International curriculum + language scores

majorTuition.zh: 北京大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Peking University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 北京大学是中国最顶尖的综合性大学，人文社科全国第一。创建于1898年，是中国现代高等教育的起源。
desc.en: Peking University is China's top comprehensive university, #1 in humanities and social sciences. Founded in 1898, the origin of modern Chinese higher education.

safetyDetail.zh: 北京大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Peking University has strict campus security and good safety.

climate.zh: 因城市而异

majorTuition.en: Fudan University tuition ~¥5,500/yr (~$763). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: Fudan is Shanghai's top comprehensive university with nationally leading journalism and economics. Highly internationalized.

safetyDetail.zh: 复旦大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Fudan University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 上海交通大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: SJTU is one of China's top science universities with strong engineering and medicine. Antai College of Economics & Management is renowned in Asia.

safetyDetail.zh: 上海交通大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.en: Zhejiang University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 浙江大学是中国规模最大的综合性大学之一，学科覆盖面极广。杭州科技创新氛围浓厚（阿里巴巴总部）。
desc.en: ZJU is one of China's largest comprehensive universities with extremely broad discipline coverage. Hangzhou is a tech innovation hub (Alibaba HQ).

safetyDetail.zh: 浙江大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Zhejiang University has strict campus security and good safety.

desc.zh: 中科大以基础科学研究闻名，量子计算和物理学研究全球领先。培养了大量中科院院士。
desc.en: USTC is famous for fundamental science with globally leading quantum computing and physics. Has produced many Chinese Academy of Sciences members.

safetyDetail.zh: 中国科学技术大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: USTC has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.en: Wuhan University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: WHU is famous for its cherry blossoms and beautiful campus. #1 globally in surveying and remote sensing. A strong century-old university.

majorTuition.en: HUST tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: HUST excels in engineering with nationally top mechanical and optoelectronics programs. Tongji Medical College has a long history.

safetyDetail.zh: 华中科技大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。

majorTuition.zh: 中山大学本科学费约¥5,500/年（约$763），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Sun Yat-sen University tuition ~¥5,500/yr (~$763). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 中山大学是华南地区最好的综合性大学，医学和商学实力突出。在深圳、珠海设有校区，大湾区就业优势明显。
desc.en: SYSU is South China's top comprehensive university with strong medicine and business. Campuses in Shenzhen and Zhuhai offer GBA employment advantages.

safetyDetail.zh: 中山大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Sun Yat-sen University has strict campus security and good safety.

desc.en: C9 League member. Top for aerospace and engineering in China.
desc.zh: C9联盟成员，中国航空航天和工程顶尖。

applicationGuide.en: Apply via Gaokao or international student exam.
applicationGuide.zh: 通过高考或留学生考试申请。

climate.zh: 请查看学校官网了解当地气候信息。
climate.en: Please check school website for local climate information.

housing.zh: 校内留学生宿舍约¥800-2000/月。部分学校可校外租房。
housing.en: On-campus international dorms ~¥800-2000/month. Some schools allow off-campus housing.

employment.zh: 中国经济发展迅速。毕业生在科技、金融、制造业就业机会多。
employment.en: China's rapid economic growth. Graduates find opportunities in tech, finance, manufacturing.

healthcare.zh: 留学生需购买医疗保险。校内有医务室。公立医院费用低廉。
healthcare.en: International students need medical insurance. Campus clinic available. Public hospital costs are low.

application.zh: 通过学校官网或中国留学基金委申请。需成绩单、HSK成绩、推荐信。
application.en: Apply via school website or CSC. Transcripts, HSK scores, recommendations required.

safetyDetail.zh: 中国整体治安良好。校园管理严格，有门禁和安保。
safetyDetail.en: China generally safe. Strict campus management with gate access and security.
